original_prompt: Can you help me write a formal email to a potential business partner proposing a joint venture?
optimized_prompt:
"Dear [Business Partner's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to propose a joint venture opportunity between our respective companies. I believe that our complementary strengths and shared goals make for a compelling partnership.

In this email, I would like to outline the key elements of the proposed joint venture, including the specific objectives, roles and responsibilities, and financial expectations. I would also appreciate the opportunity to discuss the details of the proposal with you directly.

Thank you for considering this proposal. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]"

original_prompt: Can you help me write a resignation letter to my current employer, while leaving on good terms and expressing gratitude for the opportunities provided?
optimized_prompt:
"Dear [Employer's Name],

I hope this letter finds you well. I am writing to inform you of my decision to resign from my position as [Your Position] at [Company Name], effective [Date of Last Day of Work].

I am grateful for the opportunities and experiences I have had during my time here, and I appreciate the support and guidance you have provided. I am confident that this decision will allow me to pursue new opportunities and challenges that align with my career goals.

Please let me know how I can assist with the transition process, and I will do my best to ensure a smooth handover of my responsibilities.

Thank you again for the opportunity to work with such a talented and dedicated team.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]"

I hope this revised prompt helps you write a professional and respectful resignation letter. Let me know if you have any other questions or if there's anything else I can help you with!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
